transcript:
CALLER: Good morning. I need to fix a physiotherapy session. My doctor referred me after a shoulder injury.
AGENT: Good morning! Of course, we can set that up. What's your name and contact number?
CALLER: Meera Pillai. 9900876543.
AGENT: Thank you, Meera. Do you have the referring doctor's name, just for our records?
CALLER: Yes, it was Dr. Sharma from Apollo. Orthopaedics.
AGENT: Perfect. Our physiotherapist Mr. Ganesh Khot is available Monday through Saturday, mornings and evenings. Any preference?
CALLER: Tomorrow evening would be ideal. Around 6?
AGENT: 6 PM tomorrow is available. Booked for Meera Pillai with Mr. Ganesh Khot. You'll get a confirmation message. Anything else?
CALLER: No, that's all. Thank you!
AGENT: Take care and have a speedy recovery!
